scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.test: npm run test:shared && npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:web && npm run format:check:api
scripts.check: npm run scss:types:check && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
